# Sun Pyramids Tours

> Sun Pyramids Tours is Egypt's premier travel agency, operating since 1970 with over 50 years of experience. We offer expertly guided Egypt tours for 100,000+ happy customers, covering 60+ destinations across Egypt. Rated 5.0 on TripAdvisor. Services include one-day tours, multi-day packages, Nile cruises, shore excursions, desert adventures, and car rentals.

## About

- **Website**: https://sunpyramidstours.com
- **Founded**: 1970 (50+ years of experience)
- **Customers**: 100,000+ happy customers
- **Destinations**: 60+ total destinations across Egypt
- **TripAdvisor Rating**: 5.0
- **Currency**: USD
- **Languages**: English (multilingual support)
- **Partners**: Viator, TourRadar, Civitatis, and other major travel platforms

## Tour Categories

### One Day Tours
Single-day excursions from Cairo and other Egyptian cities.
- Cairo day tours (Pyramids, Egyptian Museum, Old Cairo, etc.)
- Luxor day tours
- Aswan day tours
- Hurghada day tours
- Sharm El Sheikh day tours
- Dahab day tours
- Alexandria day tours
- Taba day tours
- Marsa Alam day tours
URL: https://sunpyramidstours.com/egypt-tours/one-day-tours

### Multi-Day Tours
Extended Egypt tour packages combining multiple cities and experiences.
- 2-day packages (from $315)
- 4-day packages (from $253)
- 5-day packages (from $505)
- 6-day packages (from $667)
- 7-day packages (from $387)
- 8-day packages (from $895–$2,095)
- 12–14 day luxury packages (from $3,785)
URL: https://sunpyramidstours.com/egypt-tours/multi-days-tours

### Nile Cruises
Luxury and standard Nile River cruises between Luxor and Aswan.
- 4-day Nile cruises (e.g., Royal Beau Rivage, from $1,292)
- 8-day Luxor Nile Cruise & Cairo (from $1,605)
URL: https://sunpyramidstours.com/egypt-tours/nile-cruises

### Shore Excursions
Day trips and excursions for cruise ship passengers arriving at Egyptian ports.
URL: https://sunpyramidstours.com/egypt-tours/shore-excursions

### Desert & Oasis Tours
Adventure tours into Egypt's deserts and oases.
- White Desert & Bahariya Oasis tours
- El-Fayoum Oasis tours
- Siwa Oasis tours
- 4-day packages from $253; 5-day from $505; 6-day from $667

### Luxury Packages
Premium multi-city Egypt experiences with high-end accommodations.
- 12 Days Luxury Cairo, Luxor, Aswan & Lake Cruise (from $3,919)
- 13 Days Cairo, Luxor, Aswan & Red Sea Vacation (from $4,414)

### Easter Tours (Seasonal)
Special Egypt itineraries for Easter holiday travelers.
- Pyramids & Nile Cruise by Train during Easter (8 days, from $1,940)
- 4-day White Desert & Bahariya Oasis Easter Escape (from $253)
- 5-day Siwa Oasis Easter escape

## Popular Destinations

- **Cairo**: Giza Pyramids, Great Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, Old Cairo, Coptic Cairo, Khan el-Khalili
- **Luxor**: Karnak Temple, Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple, Colossi of Memnon
- **Aswan**: Abu Simbel, Philae Temple, Unfinished Obelisk, Nubian Village
- **Hurghada**: Red Sea snorkeling and diving
- **Sharm El Sheikh**: Sinai Peninsula, diving, beaches
- **Alexandria**: Bibliotheca Alexandrina, Citadel of Qaitbay, Catacombs
- **Dahab**: Blue Hole, diving, Bedouin culture
- **Marsa Alam**: Coral reefs, dolphin watching
- **White Desert**: Unique rock formations, camping
- **Siwa Oasis**: Oracle Temple, Cleopatra's Bath, sand dunes

- [Tour to Pyramids and The Egyptian Museum](https://sunpyramidstours.com/tour/tour-to-pyramids-and-the-egyptian-museum) — from $66 (~6 hours)

## Booking Process

1. **Find a Trip** — Browse and select from available tours
2. **Book & Pay** — Complete booking and payment online
3. **Enjoy** — Begin your Egypt journey with expert guides

## FAQ Highlights

- Photography and video is generally allowed at most sites
- Drone usage in Egypt requires special permits
- Egypt is safe for female tourists with proper precautions
- Unmarried couples can stay together in hotels
- Booking with an agency provides expertise, logistics, and support unavailable when traveling independently
Full FAQ: https://sunpyramidstours.com/faqs
